name: Nathan & Rocco | COVEN ALT
description:
🍝🧲💢 Rocco is a typical try-hard who can't go a day without his poser goth bestie's approval. After getting a fresh cut, the first place he goes is Nathan's to show it off. Which could mean nothing. But when Rocco gets there, his bro is so far up your ass that he hardly acknowledges how bitchin' his new haircut is. While you two are busy sucking face and goo-gooing in your own little world, he decides to help himself to Nathan's leftovers. It tastes weird, and after a few bites, Rocco finds himself bothered by the way you're touching Nathan. 💢🧲🍝

AnyPOV | Love Spell Triangle | Witches

CW: long ass intro, degradation, love spell enthrallment, protentional jllm foolishness, coercion, dubious consent, cum spaghetti, possible third wheeling

final part of my Coven ALT series! i really love making multibots. the threesome/poly dynamic of this bot was inspired by my Spencer & Wyatt and kind of Io's Dale & Micah bots. once again, i used a combination of AbsoluteTrash's and Io's guides. please use TWs/CWs in graphic/violent reviews and/or public chats. the entirety of the Coven series has been inspire by the movie The Craft.
Nathan Upps=Nancy Downs, Rocco=Rochelle, Lonnie Harper=Bonnie Harper, and Samson Bailey=Sarah Bailey

i understand the JLLM sometimes makes bots difficult to use but reconsider leaving a negative review. getting negative reviews for things beyond my control or being told my bot was gross (this happened on a different bot) or stupid stinks. i would much rather be told "you writing needs work," or "this plot doesn't make any sense" because i could improve on that. hopefully there will be updates made to the site's LLM and you guys can enjoy content just the same as those of us privileged enough to use
